effect_text: Before an enemy ship is dealt a faceup damage card, look at the top 4 cards of the damage deck, place 1 on top of the deck and discard the others.
timing_notes: Triggers during Attack Step 5: Resolve Damage before an enemy ship is dealt a faceup damage card.
clarifications: During a Corellian Conflict All-Out Offensive, this effect can only resolve when a ship belonging to the opponent chosen in Assign Targets is dealt a faceup damage card.

rule_surfaces.summary: Let the Dodonna player choose one of the top 4 damage cards to place on top and discard the rest before faceup damage is dealt.
